message:
fix(polyfills): add missing util.types functions and crypto.subtle API

- Add 8 missing util.types functions in util.zig:
  - isSymbolObject, isUint8ClampedArray, isBoxedPrimitive, isProxy
  - isExternal, isModuleNamespaceObject, isMapIterator, isSetIterator
- Add crypto.subtle Web Crypto API with digest() method in crypto.zig
- Expose crypto.subtle as alias to crypto.webcrypto.subtle in crypto.js
- Add matching native implementations in require.zig as fallback
